sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66140" key="mella/rxwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελλάρχων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ἄρχων</foreign>-<sense id="n66140.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">designate</tr_>, Müller-Bees <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Inschriften der jüdischen Katakombe</tr_> Nos. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">106</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:136" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">136</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
